array.string: SERVER="root@64.226.74.167" REMOTE_APP="/root/apps/whatsapp-viewer" LOCAL_BASE="/Users/fabiodomingues/Desktop/Projects/paperclip/projects/whatsapp" LOG="/tmp/whatsapp-deploy-activity.log" C1=$(/usr/bin/rsync -az --itemize-changes --timeout=30 "$LOCAL_BASE/viewer/app.py" "$LOCAL_BASE/viewer/requirements.txt" "$LOCAL_BASE/db.py" "$SERVER:$REMOTE_APP/" 2>&1) C2=$(/usr/bin/rsync -az --itemize-changes --timeout=30 "$LOCAL_BASE/viewer/templates/index.html" "$LOCAL_BASE/viewer/templates/dashboard.html" "$SERVER:$REMOTE_APP/templates/" 2>&1) ALL="$C1$C2" if [ -z "$ALL" ]; then echo "$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ) no changes" >> "$LOG"; exit 0; fi echo "$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ) changes detected, deploying" >> "$LOG" ssh -o ConnectTimeout=15 "$SERVER" "cd $REMOTE_APP && docker compose build --quiet && docker compose up -d" >> "$LOG" 2>&1 echo "$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ) deploy complete" >> "$LOG"
